title: One Good Turn
writer: John Paddy Carstairs, Sid Colin, Maurice Cowan
actors: Norman Wisdom, Joan Rice, Shirley Abicair
plot: Norman is the oldest orphan at Greenwood Children's Home and now acts as their caretaker. All the orphans are very happy and well cared for. The adventures start when a nasty property developer (boo hiss!) who is also the chairman...
